headline: MetaMask Money Account: Earn 4% Yield and Spend via Mastercard

This is all while keeping those funds available to spend at Mastercard merchants or deploy into DeFi trading, all without leaving ...

headline: Banks, card networks, fintechs partner on ‘low-cost’ stablecoin
summary: More than 140 businesses, including BNY, Visa and Coinbase, lent their backing to a digital asset launched Tuesday by Open Standard, a consortium led by Bridge CEO Zach Abrams.

content.title: Banks, card networks, fintechs partner on ‘low-cost’ stablecoin
content.summary: More than 140 businesses, including BNY, Visa and Coinbase, lent their backing to a digital asset launched Tuesday by Open Standard, a consortium led by Bridge CEO Zach Abrams.

headline: Trump made $1B on crypto, his buyers got crushed
summary: Scott Melker discusses President Trump's latest financial disclosures, which show he earned nearly $1 billion from crypto-related ventures, while many investors in Trump-branded crypto tokens have suffered huge losses. He also discusses the launch of a new stablecoin that sent Circle Internet Group (CRCL) shares down 15%, as well as bitcoin's (BTC-USD) weakest first-half performance since 2022. "The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

content.description:
Scott Melker discusses President Trump's latest financial disclosures, which show he earned nearly $1 billion from crypto-related ventures, while many investors in Trump-branded crypto tokens have suffered huge losses. He also discusses the launch of a new stablecoin that sent Circle Internet Group (CRCL) shares down 15%, as well as bitcoin's (BTC-USD) weakest first-half performance since 2022.

headline: Why Are Coinbase (COIN) Shares Soaring Today
summary: Shares of blockchain infrastructure company Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) jumped 11.3% in the afternoon session after the company joined a major partnership with financial giants including Visa and Mastercard to launch a new U.S. dollar stablecoin called Open USD (OUSD).

headline: Is Mastercard (MA) Trading At A Premium Despite Stablecoin Moves?
summary: Mastercard’s stock has delivered a 40.6% gain over the past five years. With the shares recently closing at US$513.60 and broader valuation checks pointing to a mixed picture and an overvalued multiple category, investors are left weighing strong long term returns against a fuller look at price versus fundamentals. Over the last five years, Mastercard has returned 40.6%, which is solid but makes the current price more sensitive to how much future growth is already factored in. New...
